# just-bashit

> just-bashit is an evolving set of shfmt-conformant, bats-tested,
> shellcheck-linted shell libraries, tools, and templates — building blocks for
> writing your own robust bash tools, plus a script and function templates to
> start from.

## Documentation

- Documentation home: https://just-buildit.github.io/just-bashit/

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/just-buildit/just-bashit

## Related

- The just-buildit toolchain: https://github.com/just-buildit
